title: Assigning Values to Structure Members
description: A flowchart demonstrating the process of declaring a structure variable and assigning values to its individual members.
elements: Create a variable of that structure type (e.g., 'student1')
Access a member using the dot operator (e.g., 'student1.age')
Assign a value to the member (e.g., 'student1.age = 20;')
relationships: The structure definition acts as a blueprint
A variable is an instance created from the blueprint
The dot operator accesses a specific member within the instance
The assignment operator stores a value into that member
